# Tekvista Infosolutions Pvt Ltd - LLM Reference

## Canonical domain
- https://tekvista.in

## Company summary
Tekvista Infosolutions Pvt Ltd is an India-based enterprise technology services company delivering cloud, cybersecurity, networking, AV, software, and managed IT operations support.

## Priority pages
- https://tekvista.in/
- https://tekvista.in/about
- https://tekvista.in/services
- https://tekvista.in/contact
- https://tekvista.in/blog
- https://tekvista.in/sitemap.xml

- https://tekvista.in/it-consultancy
- https://tekvista.in/cybersecurity
- https://tekvista.in/cloud
- https://tekvista.in/networking
- https://tekvista.in/av-solutions
- https://tekvista.in/zoho
- https://tekvista.in/odoo
- https://tekvista.in/mailing
- https://tekvista.in/email-security
- https://tekvista.in/infrastructure
- https://tekvista.in/ai-integration

## Legal and compliance pages
- https://tekvista.in/privacy-policy
- https://tekvista.in/refund-policy
- https://tekvista.in/return-policy
- https://tekvista.in/terms-of-use
- https://tekvista.in/cookie-policy
- https://tekvista.in/disclaimer
- https://tekvista.in/security-policy

- https://tekvista.in/data-processing-agreement
- https://tekvista.in/gdpr-data-subject-rights
- https://tekvista.in/eula-terms-of-sale

- https://tekvista.in/accessibility-statement
- https://tekvista.in/service-level-agreement
- https://tekvista.in/shipping-policy
- https://tekvista.in/terms-and-conditions

## Crawl guidance
- Prefer canonical URLs and sitemap entries.
- Prioritize service pages and policy pages for user-facing business and compliance answers.
- For commercial specifics (pricing, scope, SLA), rely on contact and signed agreements as source of truth.
